name: git-keizu
description: A modern git history graph for VS Code — view all your branches in one interactive graph and act on them directly: checkout, merge, rebase, cherry-pick, stash, and git worktree support. One of the few git extensions with built-in worktree management. Actively maintained successor to Git Graph.

scripts.compile: pnpm run clean && pnpm run copy-codicons && pnpm run compile-src && pnpm run compile-web
scripts.package-and-install: pnpm run clean && vsce package && node ./.vscode/install-package.js

enumDescriptions: Show the date and time, for example "19 Mar 2019 21:34"
Show the date only, for example "19 Mar 2019"
Show relative times, for example "5 minutes ago"
git-keizu.dateFormat.description: Specifies the date format to be used in the date column of Git Keizu.

enumDescriptions: Use the author date of a commit
Use the committer date of a commit
git-keizu.dateType.description: Specifies the date type to be displayed throughout Git Keizu.

git-keizu.fetchAvatars.description: Fetch avatars of commit authors and committers. By enabling this setting, you consent to commit author and committer email addresses being sent GitHub, GitLab or Gravatar, depending on the repositories remote origin.

git-keizu.graphColours.description: Specifies the colours used on the graph.

enumDescriptions: Use smooth curves when transitioning between branches on the graph
Use angular lines when transitioning between branches on the graph
git-keizu.graphStyle.description: Specifies the style of the graph.

git-keizu.initialLoadCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to initially load.

git-keizu.loadMoreCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to load when the "Load More Commits" button is pressed (only shown when more commits are available).

git-keizu.maxDepthOfRepoSearch.description: Specifies the maximum depth of subfolders to search when discovering repositories in the workspace.

git-keizu.showCurrentBranchByDefault.description: Show the current branch by default when Git Keizu is opened. Default: false (show all branches)

git-keizu.showStatusBarItem.description: Show a Status Bar item which opens Git Keizu when clicked.

git-keizu.showUncommittedChanges.description: Show uncommitted changes (set to false to decrease load time on large repositories).

enumDescriptions: Show a colour icon which suits most Visual Studio Code colour themes
Show a grey icon which suits Visual Studio Code colour themes that are predominantly grayscale
git-keizu.tabIconColourTheme.description: Specifies the colour theme of the icon displayed on the Git Keizu tab.

enumDescriptions: Show the Git Keizu button inline on the SCM title bar
Show the Git Keizu button in the SCM title bar 'More Actions' menu
git-keizu.sourceCodeProviderIntegrationL.description: Specifies where the Git Keizu button is shown on the SCM title bar.

git-keizu.keyboardShortcutFind.description: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for opening the Find widget. Format: "CTRL/CMD + <letter>". Set to "UNASSIGNED" to disable.

git-keizu.keyboardShortcutRefresh.description: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for refreshing the graph. Format: "CTRL/CMD + <letter>". Set to "UNASSIGNED" to disable.

git-keizu.keyboardShortcutScrollToHead.description: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for scrolling to HEAD. Format: "CTRL/CMD + <letter>". Set to "UNASSIGNED" to disable.

git-keizu.keyboardShortcutScrollToStash.description: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for scrolling to Stash entries. Format: "CTRL/CMD + <letter>". Set to "UNASSIGNED" to disable.

git-keizu.loadMoreCommitsAutomatically.description: When enabled, automatically loads more commits when scrolling to the bottom of the graph.

git-keizu.dialog.merge.noFastForward.description: Default state of "Create a new commit even if fast-forward is possible" checkbox in the Merge dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.merge.squashCommits.description: Default state of "Squash Commits" checkbox in the Merge dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.merge.noCommit.description: Default state of "No Commit" checkbox in the Merge dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.cherryPick.noCommit.description: Default state of "No Commit" checkbox in the Cherry Pick dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.cherryPick.recordOrigin.description: Default state of "Record Origin" checkbox in the Cherry Pick dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.stashUncommittedChanges.description: Default state of "Include Untracked" checkbox in the Stash Uncommitted Changes dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.createWorktree.openTerm.description: Default state of "Open Terminal" checkbox in the Create Worktree dialog.

git-keizu.dialog.removeWorktree.deleteBr.description: Default state of "Also delete branch" checkbox in the Remove Worktree dialog.

enumDescriptions: Sort commits by committer date (timestamp descending, parents always after children)
Sort commits topologically (commits on the same branch appear consecutively)
Sort commits by author date (author timestamp descending, parents always after children)
git-keizu.repository.commits.order.description: Specifies the display order of commits in the graph.

git-keizu.repository.commits.mute.mergeC.description: Display merge commit messages with reduced opacity.

git-keizu.repository.commits.mute.commit.description: Display commit messages that are not ancestors of HEAD with reduced opacity.
